about.title: About ThreadMoat
about.description: ThreadMoat is an independent research and market intelligence platform focused on the engineering software and Industrial AI startup ecosystem. We map 600+ startups across 10 investment domains, tracking $16B+ in VC funding across 43 countries.

founder.title: About Michael Finocchiaro
founder.bio: With 30+ years of experience at Dassault Systèmes, PTC, IBM, and HP, Michael brings deep domain expertise in PLM, CAD/CAE, manufacturing, and enterprise software markets.

conference.title: Threaded! Conference Series
conference.description: Threaded! brings together startup founders, investors, and enterprise buyers for focused workshops and networking events across Europe and the US.

contact.title: Where to connect with me
contact.location: Based in Paris · Bilingual French/English · Working across US and EU time zones
